sglang.title: Fix the port_args in bench_latency
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: port_args should be created before launching tp processes to ensure all tp processes are using the same port.

sglang.title: [Profile] Add pytorch profiler
sglang.author: Ying1123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, turning on the profiler needs to uncomment the lines in scheduler.py. It will log the trace for each prefill and decode step.
I didn't add it as an option in server_args. Because I don't want to add even an if on the critical path for the profiler.

sglang.title: [Engine] Fix generate hanging issue after the first call
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, engine.generate after the first call hangs forever.
engine = sgl.Engine(model_path=model_path, random_seed=42)
engine.generate(prompt, sampling_params)
engine.generate(prompt, sampling_params) # HANGS!!!
engine.shutdown()
The root cause is tricky:

vllm.title: [Model] Support NVLM-D and fix QK Norm in InternViT
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implement NVLM-D model based on InternVL.
While testing the model, @ywang96 found that the existing implementation of parallel attention in InternViT does not work with QK normalization. Thanks @Isotr0py for fixing this!
FIX #9040
FIX #9041

vllm.title: [Doc]: Add deploying_with_k8s guide
vllm.author: haitwang-cloud
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This Pull Request introduces detailed documentation on how to deploy vLLM with Kubernetes. The new documentation is designed to help users efficiently manage and scale their machine learning models using Kubernetes and GPU resources.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add linting for github actions workflows
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces linting for github actions workflows to help prevent any
accidental introduction of errors in the future. It introduces this linting in
two ways:


A way to run the linting locally as part of format.sh.


Automatically run the linter in CI anytime github actions workflows are

vllm.title: [Frontend] API support for beam search for MQLLMEngine
vllm.author: LunrEclipse
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added support for running a higher layer of beam search across openai API server with frontend multiprocessing.
Manually testing conducted to verify that requests are still ran in parallel and output is correct.
